summary: Middle East conflict ongoing with Strait of Hormuz concerns; energy prices elevated contributing to inflation at ~4.4%. U.S.-Venezuela tensions and Greenland NATO posture. Tariff uncertainty persisting. Peace dialogue via Pakistani mediators cited as potential positive. IMF global growth forecast 3.1% for 2026.
